basic_details.job_title: BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Associate, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate / Project Assistant / Sanskrit Consultant
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 Research Associate, Project Assistante, Sanskrit Consultant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Indology or allied subject, Postgraduate in relevant subject with UGC-NET/JRF and research experience in Purāṇic studies, Postgraduate in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Archaeology / Indology with minimum 55% marks, Acharya/M.A. in Sanskrit with proficiency in Purāṇic Sanskrit texts, translation and manuscript reading
qualification.details: Research Associate: Ph.D. in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Indology or allied subject; OR Postgraduate in the relevant subject with UGC-NET/JRF and proven research experience related to Purāṇic studies, Ancient Indian polity, historiography or Sanskrit texts. Project Assistant: Postgraduate in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Archaeology / Indology or allied subject with minimum 55% marks with NET/JRF (Preferable). Sanskrit Consultant: Acharya/M.A. in Sanskrit with proficiency in Purāṇic Sanskrit texts, translation and manuscript reading.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 2026-05-25.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for BHU Recruitment 2026 is 25 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Research Associate, Project Assistant, and Sanskrit Consultant in the Banaras Hindu University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for BHU Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the designated address as per the instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate post will receive a monthly salary of ₹30,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant post is a Postgraduate degree in Ancient Indian History, Culture & Archaeology / Sanskrit / Ancient History / Archaeology / Indology or allied subject with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/JRF is preferable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the BHU Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for BHU Recruitment 2026 typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, at Banaras Hindu University.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also check the official website of Banaras Hindu University.
